Bus Timings

Al Baraha Masjid 1 Bus Stop Location in Dubai

June 18, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Al Baraha Masjid 1 Bus Stop is an essential transit hub located in the vibrant Deira area of Dubai. This bus stop is strategically positioned to provide convenient access to various local amenities, including restaurants, shopping centers, and healthcare facilities. Whether you are a daily commuter or a visitor exploring the area, this bus stop offers a crucial link to several key destinations in Dubai.

Address

Deira Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Al Baraha Masjid 1 Bus Stop Location on Google Maps here.

Located in the lively Deira district, the Al Baraha Masjid 1 Bus Stop is a key transit point in Dubai’s public transportation network. With the C15 bus route passing through, it provides convenient access to various city destinations.

Bus Routes and Timings

The bus route services the Al Baraha Masjid 1 Bus Stop in Dubai, with frequent departures throughout the day:

Bus Route Bus Station Timings
C15 Hamriya Port 12:28 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 12:58 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 1:28 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 1:58 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 2:28 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 2:58 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 3:28 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 3:48 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 4:08 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 4:28 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 4:51 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 5:11 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 5:31 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 5:53 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 6:13 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 6:32 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 6:50 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 7:10 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 7:30 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 7:50 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 8:10 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 8:29 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 8:49 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 9:09 PM
C15 Hamriya Port 9:39 PM

Bus Route Details

The Al Baraha Masjid 1 Bus Stop is serviced by the C15 bus route, providing frequent and reliable transportation throughout the day to Mamzar Beach Park Terminus.

  • C15 Route: The C15 route connects Al Baraha Masjid 1 with Mamzar Beach Park Terminus, running from early morning until late at night. Buses start operating at 06:10 AM, with departures approximately every 30 minutes. The last bus leaves at 11:10 PM. This route offers consistent connectivity to Mamzar Beach Park Terminus, a key destination for leisure and relaxation.

The C15 route ensures easy access to Mamzar Beach Park Terminus, making it a convenient option for both daily commutes and recreational visits.

Nearby Destinations

The location of the bus stop makes it an ideal starting point for accessing local amenities, shopping centers, and dining options.

Restaurants

  • Al Olfa Restaurant: Enjoy traditional Middle Eastern cuisine.

  • Pak Rose Restaurant: Offers flavorful Pakistani dishes.
  • Al Habasha Restaurant: Known for its Ethiopian specialties.
  • Baithak Restaurant: A popular spot for Indian cuisine.
  • Spice Island: Features a variety of aromatic dishes.
  • Al Najm Allame Restaurant: Serves a range of regional dishes.
  • Community Restaurant: A casual eatery with a diverse menu.

Landmarks

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  • Union Coop Abu Hail: A major retail and shopping destination.

  • Al Hamriya Park: A local green space for relaxation and recreation.
  • Emirates Post-Abu Hail Post Office: Provides postal services and general inquiries.
  • Dubai Women’s Association: A key community organization.
  • KBS Majlis: A venue for local gatherings and events.

Healthcare Facilities

  • Al Kuwait Hospital: Offers comprehensive healthcare services.

  • Abu Hail Clinic: Provides general medical consultations.
  • Al Baraha Hospital Emergency: Known for its emergency medical care.
  • Nour Al Badiya Home Health Care Service: Delivers home-based medical services.

Shopping Centers

  • Nesto Everfine Hypermarket: A large hypermarket with diverse products.

  • United Hyper Market: Features a wide range of groceries and household items.
  • Falak Al Madina Supermarket: A local favorite for everyday shopping.
  • Habib Bakery & Supermarket: Combines bakery items with general groceries.
  • Almaya Supermarket: Known for its extensive selection of goods.
  • Friday Market: Offers a variety of products in a bustling market environment.
  • Talal Super Market: Provides a range of shopping options.

Pharmacies

  • Thumbay Pharmacy: Well-stocked with pharmaceutical products.

  • First Care Pharmacy: Offers a range of health-related items.
  • Al Mouheba Pharmacy: Known for its customer service and variety.
  • Palace Pharmacy: Provides comprehensive pharmacy services.
  • New Al Hamriya Pharmacy: Offers essential medicines and healthcare products.

Nearby Stops

  1. Al Baraha Masjid 2(19m): C15, F01

  2. Abu Hail, Post Office 2(208m): C03, C15

  3. Abu Hail, Post Office 1(281m): C03, C15

  4. Baraha, Street 2(347m): C03

  5. Baraha, Street 1(414m): C03, F01

The Al Baraha Masjid 1 Bus Stop is a vital transit point within the bustling Deira area, offering convenient access to a range of essential services and local attractions. Its strategic location, frequent bus services, and proximity to various amenities make it an important hub for both daily commuters and visitors exploring the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 18, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
